creator: mcj@acquiesce.org
text:
On Wed, May 13, 1998 at 12:14:44AM -0400, Matthew Hunt wrote:
> On Tue, May 12, 1998 at 06:43:00PM -0500, mcj@acquiesce.org wrote:
> 
> > By popular demand, I'm updating the mpg123 port to .59o
> 
> Great, but it doesn't build here.  Is it a Luigi-sound-driver issue?
> (Same result on my personal post-2.2.6 machine.)
[...]

Perhaps.  It compiled almost flawlessly (one compiler warning) on my
machine, on which I use OSS:

$ uname -a
FreeBSD crescendo.bluetonic.org 2.2.6-STABLE FreeBSD 2.2.6-STABLE #0: Sat
Apr 18 17:27:30 CDT 1998
mcj@crescendo.bluetonic.org:/usr/src/sys/compile/crescendo  i386

I don't plan on fiddling with the Luigi drivers, so feel free to make
whatever changes may be necessary to the port.


 - Carey
